name: The One Ring
description: The master ring forged by Sauron in the fires of Mount Doom to control all other rings.

name: Narya
description: The Ring of Fire - one of the three Elven rings. Bestowed upon Gandalf by Círdan the Shipwright.

name: Nenya
description: The Ring of Water - one of the three Elven rings. Borne by Galadriel to preserve Lothlórien.

name: Vilya
description: The Ring of Air - mightiest of the three Elven rings. Borne by Elrond to protect Rivendell.
